name: token_forensics
description: Deep rug pull risk analysis for any ERC-20 token on Base. Goes beyond basic honeypot checks: analyzes contract ownership, proxy patterns, holder concentration, whale distribution, liquidity depth, and computes a composite rug risk score. Returns: rugScore 0-100 (higher = riskier), riskLevel (low/medium/high/critical), detailed contract/holder/liquidity breakdown. Use when: you need to verify a token before a large swap, want to detect potential rugs before they happen, or need forensic data for a report.

token.description: 0x contract address of the ERC-20 token to analyze (Base mainnet)
